sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Fatal accident involving a SportStar SLM, G-CMGB, Chesterfield, Derbyshire, 1 September 2024

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: After departing Coal Aston Airfield, the pilot of G-CMGB encountered weather that was not compatible with flight under VFR. Following a series of descending orbits overhead Chesterfield, the aircraft departed from controlled flight and struck the ground, fatally injuring the pilot.

sourceReferences.citationText: aaib-bulletins – AAIB Report: SportStar SLM, G-CMGB
